# Earning Points

Acme Rewards members earn one point for every dollar spent on eligible merchandise, excluding taxes, shipping, and gift-card purchases. Points are credited to the account two business days after an order ships, which prevents the issue of orphaned points from returned items. Additionally, members receive double points for seven days following their recorded birthday.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#earning-points]
